# zstack_iscsi_server (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage iSCSI servers in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address of the iSCSI server.

### Optional

- `chap_user_name` (String, Sensitive) The CHAP username for the iSCSI server.
- `chap_user_password` (String, Sensitive) The CHAP user password for the iSCSI server.
- `name` (String) The name of the iSCSI server.
- `port` (Number) The port of the iSCSI server.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the iSCSI server.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the iSCSI server.
